content_body: The weather was perfect! It was in the low 80s during the day and 70s at night. We loved exploring the river! The Sweet Shoppe was our favorite, then Mercier Orchards, Taste of Amish, gem mining, tubing, CrossFit Fannin is the absolute best! Some other places we enjoyed were Huck’s General Store, Southern Charm, Blue Jeans Pizza and Bearding Bottle Shop. One our favorite moments were seeing a bear out by the trash, it was super exciting! We also saw quite a few turkeys as well as waving to the train as it passed every day. This has been a fabulous experience! This cabin is absolutely perfect, it was well stocked with beautiful views! It helped create the most wonderful vacation. We are in love with Blue Ridge! The downtown shops are fun to visit and so many people are extremely friendly. We felt like we were able to do so much being so close to town and yet there is still so much we want to do! We will definitely be back!  -The Grow Family
title: Beautiful Views, Perfect Cabin
